requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for Hungary PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——匈牙利光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——匈牙利光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據

summary.en: Hungary PV inverter EMC requirements are governed by the EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU and MSZT-adopted harmonised standards. The practical EMC package should include IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and applicable IEC 61000-series evidence for emissions, immunity, harmonics, surge, voltage dips, and power quality. For MAVIR and DSO grid-connected projects, harmonic and conducted-emission evidence should be tied to the actual inverter model, rating, and configuration. Hungary uses a 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid, so EMC and harmonic results obtained only under China 220/380 V conditions should be reviewed for applicability before submission. CE marking under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU is mandatory before placing inverters on the Hungarian/EU market. MSZT publishes harmonised standards as MSZ EN standards.
summary.zh: 匈牙利光伏逆变器EMC要求受欧盟电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU及MSZT采用的协调标准约束。实际EMC包应包括面向光伏功率变换设备的IEC 62920，以及适用的IEC 61000系列发射、抗扰度、谐波、浪涌、电压暂降和电能质量证据。对于MAVIR及配电系统运营商并网项目，谐波和传导发射证据应对应实际逆变器型号、功率等级和配置。匈牙利电网为230/400 V、50 Hz，仅在中国220/380 V条件下取得的EMC和谐波结果，在提交前应审查其适用性。在匈牙利/欧盟市场销售逆变器前，须依据电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU取得CE标志。MSZT以MSZ EN标准形式发布协调标准。
summary.zht: 匈牙利光伏逆變器EMC要求受歐盟電磁相容指令2014/30/EU及MSZT採用的協調標準約束。實際EMC包應包括面向光伏功率轉換設備的IEC 62920，以及適用的IEC 61000系列發射、抗擾度、諧波、浪湧、電壓暫降和電能品質證據。對於MAVIR及配電系統運營商併網項目，諧波和傳導發射證據應對應實際逆變器型號、功率等級和配置。匈牙利電網為230/400 V、50 Hz，僅在中國220/380 V條件下取得的EMC和諧波結果，在提交前應審查其適用性。在匈牙利/歐盟市場銷售逆變器前，須依據電磁相容指令2014/30/EU取得CE標誌。MSZT以MSZ EN標準形式發布協調標準。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test, immunity, harmonic, surge, voltage-dip, and power-quality standards as applicable to the inverter configuration
MSZT harmonised standards (MSZ EN series) and MAVIR/DSO grid-connection documentation requirements

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic EMC test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. These reports can be useful engineering background but are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62920 or the IEC 61000-series evidence required for EU CE marking under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU, or for MAVIR/DSO grid-connection review in Hungary. China test conditions are normally aligned with the China 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline, while Hungary uses 230/400 V at the same frequency.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021及来自CNAS认可实验室的相关国内EMC测试报告。这些报告可作为工程背景，但不能自动等同于依据欧盟电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU取得CE标志所需的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列证据，也无法替代匈牙利MAVIR/配电系统运营商并网审查所需证据。中国测试条件通常对应中国220/380 V、50 Hz基准，而匈牙利在相同频率下使用230/400 V。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021及來自CNAS認可實驗室的相關國內EMC測試報告。這些報告可作為工程背景，但不能自動等同於依據歐盟電磁相容指令2014/30/EU取得CE標誌所需的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列證據，也無法替代匈牙利MAVIR/配電系統運營商併網審查所需證據。中國測試條件通常對應中國220/380 V、50 Hz基準，而匈牙利在相同頻率下使用230/400 V。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited domestic EMC test reports under China standard scopes

gap.en: Gap: China-only EMC certificates under GB/T 37408 do not satisfy the EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU requirements or Hungarian/MAVIR project expectations. Exporters must obtain IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the specific model or family, confirm whether harmonics and conducted-emission results remain valid at 230/400 V, and build an EU Declaration of Conformity under the EMC Directive. Where MAVIR, DSOs, or the project owner specifies harmonic limits or power-quality measurements, test reports should be mapped clause-by-clause to that requirement. Hungarian-language summaries of EMC test evidence may be required for local grid-connection submissions.
gap.zh: 差距：仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不满足欧盟电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU要求或匈牙利/MAVIR项目要求。出口商须取得针对特定型号或系列的IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列报告，确认谐波和传导发射结果在230/400 V下是否仍有效，并依据电磁兼容指令建立欧盟符合性声明。若MAVIR、配电系统运营商或项目业主规定谐波限值或电能质量测量，应将测试报告逐条映射至该要求。当地并网申请提交可能需要EMC测试证据的匈牙利语摘要。
gap.zht: 差距：僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不滿足歐盟電磁相容指令2014/30/EU要求或匈牙利/MAVIR項目要求。出口商須取得針對特定型號或系列的IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列報告，確認諧波和傳導發射結果在230/400 V下是否仍有效，並依據電磁相容指令建立歐盟符合性聲明。若MAVIR、配電系統運營商或項目業主規定諧波限值或電能品質測量，應將測試報告逐條映射至該要求。當地併網申請提交可能需要EMC測試證據的匈牙利語摘要。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU is required before placing PV inverters on the Hungarian/EU market; IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 evidence is effectively mandatory for MAVIR/DSO grid-connection technical review
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 EMC evidence is a China domestic voluntary or certification-programme baseline and is not an EU EMC Directive substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Hungary PV inverter EMC as an EU CE evidence package, not a China GB/T certificate transfer. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the exact inverter model, review harmonic and EMC applicability at Hungary's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid voltage, issue an EU Declaration of Conformity under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU, and confirm MAVIR/DSO and project-owner EMC requirements. Hungarian-language documentation may be required for local submissions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 匈牙利光伏逆变器EMC应按欧盟CE证据包处理，而不是直接转移中国GB/T证书。请为准确逆变器型号准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列报告，审查谐波和EMC结果在匈牙利230/400 V、50 Hz电网电压下的适用性，依据电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU出具欧盟符合性声明，并确认MAVIR/配电系统运营商及项目业主EMC要求。当地提交可能需要匈牙利语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 匈牙利光伏逆變器EMC應按歐盟CE證據包處理，而不是直接轉移中國GB/T證書。請為準確逆變器型號準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列報告，審查諧波和EMC結果在匈牙利230/400 V、50 Hz電網電壓下的適用性，依據電磁相容指令2014/30/EU出具歐盟符合性聲明，並確認MAVIR/配電系統運營商及項目業主EMC要求。當地提交可能需要匈牙利語文件。
